title: phalaris utricularis
intro: Phalaris utricularis, also known as water ribgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include being a diuretic and having anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits associated with Phalaris utricularis include its ability to treat urinary issues, such as kidney stones and bladder problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Phalaris utricularis can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be consulted with a medical professional before consumption.
